title: aira biebersteinii
intro: Aira biebersteinii, also known as Bieber's Hair Grass or Russian Hair Grass, is a species of grass native to Eastern Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Aira biebersteinii include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and ease congestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Aira biebersteinii is often prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the dried roots and leaves in hot water, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
